title: Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'
why_this_song: Wanna Be Startin' Somethin' by Michael Jackson (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 40 times; first heard in: "You're too low to get under (yeah, yeah)"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "I said you wanna be startin' somethin'"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "I said you wanna be startin' somethin'"
Appears 18 times; first heard in: "You're a vegetable (you're a vegetable)"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "It's too high to get over (yeah, yeah)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I said you wanna be startin' somethin'
So your tongue became a razor
It's too high to get over (yeah, yeah)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
